text:

patch

error:

[ 27%] Building CXX object src/CMakeFiles/konsoleprivate.dir/ColorScheme.o
cd /wrkdirs/usr/ports/x11/konsole/work/.build/src && /nxb-bin/usr/bin/c++   -DKDE4_CMAKE_TOPLEVEL_DIR_LENGTH=35 -DKDE_DEFAULT_DEBUG_AREA=1211 -DKDE_DEPRECATED_WARNINGS -DMAKE_KONSOLEPRIVATE_LIB -DQT_NO_CAST_TO_ASCII -DQT_NO_STL -DQT_USE_FAST_CONCATENATION -DQT_USE_FAST_OPERATOR_PLUS -D_REENTRANT -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/x11/konsole/work/.build/src -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/x11/konsole/work/konsole-4.14.3/src -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/x11/konsole/work/konsole-4.14.3 -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/x11/konsole/work/.build -I/usr/local/include/kde4 -I/usr/local/include/kde4/KDE -I/usr/local/include/KDE -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include/qt4/phonon -I/usr/local/include/qt4/QtXmlPatterns -I/usr/local/include/qt4/QtXml -I/usr/local/include/qt4/QtWebKit -I/usr/local/include/qt4/QtTest -I/usr/local/include/qt4/QtSvg -I/usr/local/include/qt4/QtSql -I/usr/local/include/qt4/QtScript -I/usr/local/include/qt4/QtOpenGL -I/usr/local/include/qt4/QtNetwork -I/usr/local/include/qt4/QtDeclarative -I/usr/local/include/qt4/QtDBus -I/usr/local/include/qt4/Qt3Support -I/usr/local/include/qt4/QtGui -I/usr/local/include/qt4/QtCore -I/usr/local/include/qt4/Qt -I/usr/local/share/qt4/mkspecs/default -I/usr/local/include/qt4 -O2 -pipe -fno-builtin-sin -fno-builtin-cos -fno-strict-aliasing -fno-builtin-sin -fno-builtin-cos -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Wno-long-long -Wundef -Wcast-align -Wchar-subscripts -Wall -W -Wpointer-arith -Wformat-security -Woverloaded-virtual -fno-common -fvisibility=hidden -Werror=return-type -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -Wno-return-type-c-linkage -O2 -DNDEBUG -DQT_NO_DEBUG -fPIC    -D_LARGEFILE64_SOURCE -o CMakeFiles/konsoleprivate.dir/ColorScheme.o -c /wrkdirs/usr/ports/x11/konsole/work/konsole-4.14.3/src/ColorScheme.cpp
/wrkdirs/usr/ports/x11/konsole/work/konsole-4.14.3/src/ColorScheme.cpp:409:9: error: call to 'qFuzzyCompare' is ambiguous
    if (qFuzzyCompare(1.0, opacity)) {
        ^~~~~~~~~~~~~
/usr/local/include/qt4/QtCore/qglobal.h:2156:37: note: candidate function
Q_DECL_CONSTEXPR static inline bool qFuzzyCompare(double p1, double p2)


The attached patch fixes the issue, obtained from mmel@
